title: calophyllum collinum
intro: Calophyllum collinum, also known as Indian calophyllum or sweet calophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is a tropical tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and fever. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum collinum include oil and ointment, which are used topically to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
